titleStmt.title: SII 27.239: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 239. (A.R. No. 591 of 1929-30.) KUMRUGŌḌU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Śankaranārāyaṇa temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1267, Pārthiva, Āśvayuja śu. 10, Tulā[7], Thursday corresponding to 1345 A.D., October 6.

It registers a gift of land in Brahmapura and Kuṁmarakōḍa as sarvamānya to Nāraṇa-nāyaka and others by the king in the presence of the ministers while he was holding assembly in his palace (hiryaramane) at Bārakūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁga śakavaruṣa 1267 neya pārtthiva saṁvatsa
rada Āśvayuja śuddha 10 tulāmāsa 7 neya gu
vāradina svasti śrīmatpāṁḍya cakravarti Arirā
ya basava saṁkara rāyagajāṁkusa śrī vīrakulasē
karadēvāḷpēṁdra dēvarsarava vijeya rājyaṁgeyu
vutamiralu bārakūra hiriyamaneyalire
samasta pradhānarū nāraṇanāykarū muṁtāda
parapaḷināykarige baradukoṭṭa śilāśāsanada
kramaveṁteṁdaḍe Ā parapaḷināykaraAge brahmapura
dalu kuṁmarakōḍa Adhivāsadalu taṁma bra
hmadāyada bāḷubittuva bede bhūmige
9 77 . mūḍe kuḷāgrakke baṁdasamadāya
vosageyaṁnū sarvamāṁnyavāgi koṭu
ru yi dharmmavācaṁrarkkasthāyiyāgi naḍau
du Aṁṇavoraṁbaḷi nāraṇavoraṁba
ḷiya biravu 23 yadaṁ barada śilāśāsana
svadattāṁra padattāṁ vā yo harēti vasuṁdha
rāṁ ṣaṣṭirvaruṣa sahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatēkrimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu
kālē pālanīyōbhavadbhiḥ
n pārthivēṁdrā bhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . yi
śrī madarsarige maṁgaḷamahā śrī
śrī ra saṁnidhiyali kuṁjñaṁṇna
barada śilāśāsana śrī .
Digital edition of SII 27.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
